description_long: This is a rectangular, antique-style cabinet or chest with a weathered, dark gray wooden exterior. The front face features ornate black decorative metalwork, including a central medallion and corner flourishes, giving it a vintage or gothic appearance. The sides and back are similarly adorned with black corner embellishments, but lack the central medallion seen on the front. The surface appears to be made of aged wood, with visible grain and a slightly distressed texture, suggesting long-term use or intentional aging. The object is solid and boxy, with no visible legs or feet, and the top is flat, suitable for placing items. There is a suggestion of a lid or door on the front, likely accessible via the central medallion, which may function as a handle.
description: A rectangular, antique-style wooden cabinet or chest with ornate black metalwork and a weathered finish. The front features a decorative medallion, while the sides and back have matching corner embellishments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the ornate central medallion and decorative black corner flourishes.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the rectangular shape and black corner embellishments, with no central medallion.
description_view_2: Back view with only the black corner decorations and a plain central panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with corner embellishments and a flat surface.
